attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
,SORCT.TRX_NUMBER BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER
,NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' OR NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='DM' THEN 'CMDM' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'INVOICE' END AR_TRX_CLASS_TYPE
,SORCT.TRX_DATE AR_TRX_DATETIME
,SORCT.REASON_CODE AR_TRX_REASON_CODE
,SORCT.COMPLETE_FLAG AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG
,SORCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
,SORCT.PURCHASE_ORDER RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='CM' THEN 'CREDIT MEMO' ELSE 'DEBIT MEMO' END RU_AR_CMDM_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
,NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SAT_ADJ.AR_TRX_KEY RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY
,SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
,SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT
,CASE WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN -9999
WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN -8888
/*added for SaaS*/
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE*/
 AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN -9999
WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE*/
AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN -8888
ELSE SALES_ORDER_KEY END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
,EAPT.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME 
,SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
,CAST(SORCT.TRX_DATE AS DATE) DV_AR_TRX_DT
,CASE WHEN SORCT.REQUEST_ID IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
/* START ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY15 LSS PROGRAM */
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE*/
 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DISPUTED_ROLE
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE*/
AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN  ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN 'Y' ELSE '=' END ) ELSE 'N' END  AS RU_WITH_COMP_DATE_ROLE

,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE*/
 THEN COALESCE(SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10,'UNKNOWN') 
      ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RU_SAF_TYPE_CD
                  
,CAST(CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE*/
AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN EOXSH.COMPENSATION_DATE ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END )
      ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_COMPENSATION_DTM 
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE*/
 AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN EOXSH.COMPENSATION_DATE ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END )
      ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END AS RU_DV_COMPENSATION_DT
/* END ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY15 LSS PROGRAM */
,SORCT.ACTION_CODE
,'I' DML_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_AR_TRX_PREV_CUST_TRX_ID WATPCTI
                ON (WATPCTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND WATPCTI.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
                ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
                AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
                ON (SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = WATPCTI.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
                AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
                ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

/*  JOIN BY USING EL_AR_TRX_TYPE :  rchettri : LSS-Q2fy13                           
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
                ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
        AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT
                ON  SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
                AND SORCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
                AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
                ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE
                                
                                
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
                ON (NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
                ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
                ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS
                ON (  SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID =SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
                AND SORCT.ORG_ID      =SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
                AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   =SABS.SS_CD  )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
                ON((CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL  AND  (  SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' OR   SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='BO' ) 
                THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END )=EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME=EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX WIORCT
                ON ( SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = WIORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCT.GLOBAL_NAME )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER SO
                ON (SO.BK_COMPANY_CODE =  EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                AND SO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  = EOUGC. SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   = CAST(WIORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 AS INTEGER ) )
                /* START ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY15 LSS PROGRAM */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HEADER EOXSH
               ON SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 = CAST(EOXSH.SAF_ID AS VARCHAR(30))
               and NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXSH.GLOBAL_NAME  /* LSS-UKH post fix */ 
/* END ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY15 LSS PROGRAM */

SELECT 
SORCT.BATCH_ID,
SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
SORCT.ORG_ID,
SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCT.TRX_NUMBER,
SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,
SORCT.TRX_DATE,
SORCT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,
SORCT.REASON_CODE,
SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SORCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
SORCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
SORCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
SORCT.ATTRIBUTE10,
SORCT.REQUEST_ID,
SORCT.COMPLETE_FLAG,
SORCT.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT,
SORCT.ATTRIBUTE1,
SORCT.SOURCE_BATCH_ID,
SORCT.BILL_TO_ADDRESS_ID,
SORCT.BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SORCT.COMMENTS,
SORCT.CREATED_BY,
SORCT.CREATION_DATE,
SORCT.DEFAULT_TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,
SORCT.EXCHANGE_DATE,
SORCT.EXCHANGE_RATE,
SORCT.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
SORCT.FINANCE_CHARGES,
SORCT.FOB_POINT,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE13,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE14,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE2,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9,
SORCT.INTERNAL_NOTES,
SORCT.PRIMARY_SALESREP_ID,
SORCT.PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE,
SORCT.REMITTANCE_BATCH_ID,
SORCT.SHIP_DATE_ACTUAL,
SORCT.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SORCT.SHIP_VIA,
SORCT.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SORCT.SOLD_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
SORCT.TERM_DUE_DATE,
SORCT.TERM_ID,
SORCT.TERRITORY_ID,
SORCT.WAYBILL_NUMBER,
SORCT.PURCHASE_ORDER,
SORCT.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCT.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCT.ACTION_CODE ,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC	
	ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE (
NOT EXISTS 
	( 
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC	
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS 
	( 
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC,
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT,	
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	WHERE       
		SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
		AND SORCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
		AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
	
		AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE
		
		/* rchettri : changed join condition by introducing EL_AR_TRX_TYPE: LSS-Q2fy13
          NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE      =EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
        AND  SORCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
		*/
		)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$STGDB.WI_AR_TRX_PREV_CUST_TRX_ID WATPCTI,
	$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
	WHERE WATPCTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND WATPCTI.GLOBAL_NAME=SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = WATPCTI.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NSTCA
	WHERE NSTCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	WHERE NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	WHERE NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS /*rchettri LSS Q3FY14 AUS Migration: Added 3NF */
	WHERE SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID = SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID      = SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT     
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   = SABS.SS_CD 
	AND SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
	WHERE (CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL  AND  (  SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' OR   SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='BO' ) 
THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END ) = EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
	AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME
	)

)

SELECT 
SMRCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SMRCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
CASE 
 WHEN SMRCT.CREATION_DATE<'2005-08-15 00:00:00' THEN COALESCE(SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID ,-9999)
 ELSE
  CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN -9999
  ELSE 
   CAST(
   CASE
    WHEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT in('ORDER ENTRY','METRIX') THEN 
		CASE 
		WHEN (SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9 =0 
			OR SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9 IS NULL)  
		THEN -9999 
		ELSE SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9 
		END
    WHEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
	THEN 
		CASE 
		WHEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10   IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
		THEN -9999
			ELSE 
				CASE WHEN (SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11 = 0 
						OR SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11 IS NULL)
					THEN -9999
					ELSE SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11
				END
		END 
	/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY15*/
	WHEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
	
	THEN -9999 
    ELSE -9999
   END AS DECIMAL(15,0)) 
   END 
END   PREV_CUSOMER_TRX_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SMRCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMRCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON( SMRCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
    
/*  JOIN BY USING EL_AR_TRX_TYPE :  rchettri : LSS-Q2fy13	  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
    ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT= SMRCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
                   AND  NATT.SS_CODE= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                   AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE      =EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
                   AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY        
                    )
*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT
	ON  SMRCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
	AND SMRCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID) + SMATKEY.MAX_VAL AR_TRX_KEY,
SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMARTRX.AR_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMARTRX ) SMATKEY,
$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
	
/*  JOIN BY USING EL_AR_TRX_TYPE :  rchettri : LSS-Q2fy13		
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
	ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
        AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT
	ON  SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE
		
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
	ON (NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMATRX
			WHERE SMATRX.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			AND SMATRX.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID)

SELECT 
EORCT.BATCH_ID,
EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
EORCT.ORG_ID,
EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
EORCT.TRX_NUMBER,
EORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,
EORCT.TRX_DATE,
EORCT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
EORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,
EORCT.REASON_CODE,
EORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
EORCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
EORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
EORCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
EORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
EORCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
EORCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
EORCT.ATTRIBUTE10,
EORCT.REQUEST_ID,
EORCT.COMPLETE_FLAG,

OR (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%02%' 
AND (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2E%'
and CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2D%'))
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%05%'

OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%07%' 
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3A%' 
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3B%'
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3C%'

OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3E%'
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%03%'
OR CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1))=0
OR INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 is NULL
OR INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 = 0 )) 
THEN -9999 
ELSE INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 
END AS INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1  FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX

	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC	
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS 
	( 
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC,
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT,
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	WHERE
		SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
		AND SORCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
		AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
	
		AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE
		/*  rchettri : changed joing condition by intorducting el_ar_trx_type : LSS-Q2fy13
		NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE      =EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
        AND  SORCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
		*/
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_PREV_CUST_TRX_ID WATPCTI,
	$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
	WHERE WATPCTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND WATPCTI.GLOBAL_NAME=SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = WATPCTI.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NSTCA
	WHERE NSTCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	WHERE NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	WHERE NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
	WHERE SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID = SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID      = SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   = SABS.SS_CD 
	AND SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
	WHERE (CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL  AND  SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME IN ('CG','CDC')  THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END ) = EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
	AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME
	)

)

SELECT
SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
,SORCT.TRX_NUMBER BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER
,NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' OR NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='DM' THEN 'CMDM' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'INVOICE' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='DEP' THEN 'DEPOSIT' END AR_TRX_CLASS_TYPE 
,SORCT.TRX_DATE AR_TRX_DATETIME
,SORCT.REASON_CODE AR_TRX_REASON_CODE
,SORCT.COMPLETE_FLAG AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG
,SORCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
,SORCT.PURCHASE_ORDER RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='CM' THEN 'CREDIT MEMO' ELSE 'DEBIT MEMO' END RU_AR_CMDM_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
,NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,CASE WHEN SO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY >0 THEN SO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
WHEN NATS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY >0 THEN NATS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
ELSE NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SAT_ADJ.AR_TRX_KEY RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY
,SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
,SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT
,CASE 
WHEN NATS.SALES_ORDER_KEY>0 THEN  NATS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN 
('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','DCA TWO TIER','DCA TWO-TIER' ,'COOP TWO TIER','COOP TWO-TIER','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
   /* ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
THEN -7777
WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' THEN -7777
WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN -9999
WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN -8888 
WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN -4444   /* ADDED AS PART OF CDC */                       
ELSE SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
,EAPT.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME 
,SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
,CAST(SORCT.TRX_DATE AS DATE) DV_AR_TRX_DT
,CASE WHEN SORCT.REQUEST_ID IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
/* START ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY15 LSS PROGRAM */
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DISPUTED_ROLE
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') 
THEN ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN 'Y' ELSE '=' END ) ELSE 'N' END  AS RU_WITH_COMP_DATE_ROLE
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
THEN COALESCE(SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RU_SAF_TYPE_CD
,CAST(CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN EOXSH.COMPENSATION_DATE ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END )
      ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_COMPENSATION_DTM 
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
 AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN EOXSH.COMPENSATION_DATE ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END )
      ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END AS RU_DV_COMPENSATION_DT
,SORCT.ACTION_CODE
,'I' DML_TYPE
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(CAL.CALENDAR_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) ELSE CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS RUSSIA_TRX_DATE
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE2,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_TRANS_NUM
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(CAL1.CALENDAR_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) ELSE CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS RUSSIA_AOA_ISSUANCE_DATE
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT'  AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT NOT IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS')
THEN COALESCE(SUBSTR(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15,1,POSITION('_' IN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15) -1),'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_AOA_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE7,'=') ELSE '=' END AS RUSSIA_UPFRONT_BILLING_FLG
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE10,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_CORRECTION_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(CAST(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE4 AS INTEGER),-9999) ELSE -9999 END AS RUSSIA_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RUSSIA_ROLE
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT LIKE '%ICMS%' THEN CAST(EOXSH.C_ATTRIBUTE8 AS VARCHAR(250))
      ELSE CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(250)) END AS ICMS_DEAL_ID_INFO_TXT	  
,CASE WHEN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE2='HYBRID-INVOICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HYBRID_INVOICE_FLG 	 
,COALESCE(TRIM(SUBSTR(LKP.ATTRIBUTE6,1, POSITION('~~' IN LKP.ATTRIBUTE6)-1)),'UNKNOWN') AS DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL1_REASON_CD 
,COALESCE(SUBSTRING(LKP.ATTRIBUTE6,POSITION('~~' IN LKP.ATTRIBUTE6)+2),'UNKNOWN') AS DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL2_REASON_CD
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_PREV_CUST_TRX_ID WATPCTI
                ON (WATPCTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND WATPCTI.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
                ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
                AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
                ON (SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = WATPCTI.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
                AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
                ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT

                AND SORCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
                AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME				
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES LKP
ON LKP.LOOKUP_CODE = SORCT.REASON_CODE
AND LKP.LOOKUP_TYPE='CREDIT_MEMO_REASON'
AND LKP.LANG = 'US'
AND LKP.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
AND LKP.ATTRIBUTE6 LIKE '%~~%'
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
                ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
                ON (NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
                ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
                ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS
                ON (  SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID =SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
                AND SORCT.ORG_ID      =SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
                AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   =SABS.SS_CD  )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
                ON SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
                ON((CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL  AND  SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME IN ('CG','CDC') THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END )=EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME=EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX WIORCT
                ON ( SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = WIORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCT.GLOBAL_NAME )
				
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
WHERE COALESCE(TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%') LINE_EXTN
ON SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 				
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER SO
                ON (SO.BK_COMPANY_CODE =  EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                AND SO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  = EOUGC. SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   = 
				CASE WHEN LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID IS NOT NULL OR SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN CAST( (CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 IS NULL OR SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 = '0' THEN '-9999'
ELSE SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 END) AS DECIMAL(26,0)  )
				ELSE CAST(WIORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 AS DECIMAL(26,0)  ) END )
				
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HEADER EOXSH
                ON SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 = CAST(EOXSH.SAF_ID AS VARCHAR(30))
                and NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXSH.GLOBAL_NAME  /* LSS-UKH post fix */ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NATS
ON NATS.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT_ADJ.AR_TRX_KEY /* to derive SO key based on PREV customer trx ID reference*/
				
LEFT OUTER JOIN SYS_CALENDAR.CALENDAR CAL

LEFT OUTER JOIN SYS_CALENDAR.CALENDAR CAL1
ON CAST(SUBSTR(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15,POSITION('_' IN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15) +1) AS VARCHAR(50)) = CAST (CAST(CAL1.CALENDAR_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'MMDDYYYY') AS CHAR(50))
WHERE UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) NOT IN ('SERVICE RMA','T4C SALES ADJ','DISPUTE', 'T4C - SERVICE CM','ICMS-ADJ')
UNION ALL
SELECT
SAT.AR_TRX_KEY

,NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE

,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='CM' THEN 'CREDIT MEMO' ELSE 'DEBIT MEMO' END RU_AR_CMDM_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE

,NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY

WHEN NATS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY >0 THEN NATS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
ELSE NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY

,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE

,CASE

WHEN SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' THEN -7777
         WHEN SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CDC' THEN -4444
         WHEN SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN -9999
         WHEN SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN -8888

,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE2,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_TRANS_NUM
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(CAL1.CALENDAR_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) ELSE CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS RUSSIA_AOA_ISSUANCE_DATE

THEN COALESCE(SUBSTR(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15,1,POSITION('_' IN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15) -1),'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_AOA_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE7,'=') ELSE '=' END AS RUSSIA_UPFRONT_BILLING_FLG
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE10,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_CORRECTION_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(CAST(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE4 AS INTEGER),-9999) ELSE -9999 END AS RUSSIA_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RUSSIA_ROLE

,CASE WHEN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE2='HYBRID-INVOICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HYBRID_INVOICE_FLG	 
,COALESCE(TRIM(SUBSTR(LKP.ATTRIBUTE6,1, POSITION('~~' IN LKP.ATTRIBUTE6)-1)),'UNKNOWN') AS DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL1_REASON_CD 
,COALESCE(SUBSTRING(LKP.ATTRIBUTE6,POSITION('~~' IN LKP.ATTRIBUTE6)+2),'UNKNOWN') AS DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL2_REASON_CD
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_PREV_CUST_TRX_ID WATPCTI
                ON (WATPCTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND WATPCTI.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
                ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
                AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
                ON (SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = WATPCTI.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
                AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
                ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT
                ON  SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
                AND SORCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
                AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
				/* ADDED AS PART OF FLEXI INVOICE SCOPE */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES LKP
ON LKP.LOOKUP_CODE = SORCT.REASON_CODE
AND LKP.LOOKUP_TYPE='CREDIT_MEMO_REASON'
AND LKP.LANG = 'US'
AND LKP.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
AND LKP.ATTRIBUTE6 LIKE '%~~%'
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
                ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE

                AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE                              
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS

                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME=EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME)

                ON ( SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = WIORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCT.GLOBAL_NAME )

,SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
,SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT

                                WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN -8888

,COALESCE(SUBSTRING(LKP.ATTRIBUTE6,POSITION('~~' IN LKP.ATTRIBUTE6)+2),'UNKNOWN') AS DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL2_REASON_CD

$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT

                ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_PREV_CUST_TRX_ID WATPCTI
                ON (WATPCTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND WATPCTI.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)

                AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

                AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES LKP
ON LKP.LOOKUP_CODE = SORCT.REASON_CODE
AND LKP.LOOKUP_TYPE='CREDIT_MEMO_REASON'
AND LKP.LANG = 'US'
AND LKP.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'	
AND LKP.ATTRIBUTE6 LIKE '%~~%'	
	INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
                ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
                ON (NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
                ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
                ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS
                ON (  SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID =SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
                AND SORCT.ORG_ID      =SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
                AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   =SABS.SS_CD  )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
                ON SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
                ON((CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL  AND  SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME IN('CG','CDC')      THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END )=EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME=EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME)
				INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX WIORCT
                ON ( SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = WIORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCT.GLOBAL_NAME )
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
WHERE COALESCE(TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%') LINE_EXTN
ON SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 				
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER SO
                ON (SO.BK_COMPANY_CODE =  EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                AND SO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  = EOUGC. SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   = 
				CASE WHEN LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID IS NOT NULL 
				OR SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
				THEN CAST((CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 IS NULL OR SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 = '0' THEN '-9999'
ELSE SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 END) AS DECIMAL(15,0)  )
				ELSE CAST(WIORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 AS DECIMAL(15,0)  ) END )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NATS
ON NATS.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT_ADJ.AR_TRX_KEY /* to derive SO key based on PREV customer trx ID reference*/
				
LEFT OUTER JOIN SYS_CALENDAR.CALENDAR CAL
ON CAST(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE3 AS VARCHAR(50)) = CAST (CAST(CAL.CALENDAR_DATE  AS DATE FORMAT 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS CHAR(50))    
LEFT OUTER JOIN SYS_CALENDAR.CALENDAR CAL1
ON CAST(SUBSTR(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15,POSITION('_' IN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15) +1) AS VARCHAR(50)) = CAST (CAST(CAL1.CALENDAR_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'MMDDYYYY') AS CHAR(50))				
WHERE UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('T4C SALES ADJ', 'T4C - SERVICE CM')
UNION ALL
SELECT
SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
,SORCT.TRX_NUMBER BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER
,NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' OR NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='DM' THEN 'CMDM' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'INVOICE' END AR_TRX_CLASS_TYPE
,SORCT.TRX_DATE AR_TRX_DATETIME
,SORCT.REASON_CODE AR_TRX_REASON_CODE
,SORCT.COMPLETE_FLAG AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG
,SORCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
,SORCT.PURCHASE_ORDER RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='CM' THEN 'CREDIT MEMO' ELSE 'DEBIT MEMO' END RU_AR_CMDM_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
,NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,CASE WHEN SO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY >0 THEN SO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
WHEN NATS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY >0 THEN NATS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
ELSE NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SAT_ADJ.AR_TRX_KEY RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY
,SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
,SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT
,CASE    
WHEN NATS.SALES_ORDER_KEY>0 THEN  NATS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN -7777
                                WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN -9999
                                WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN -8888
								WHEN SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN -4444
                                ELSE SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
,EAPT.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME 
,SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
,CAST(SORCT.TRX_DATE AS DATE) DV_AR_TRX_DT
,CASE WHEN SORCT.REQUEST_ID IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
/* START ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY15 LSS PROGRAM */
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DISPUTED_ROLE
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
 AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN 'Y' ELSE '=' END ) ELSE 'N' END  AS RU_WITH_COMP_DATE_ROLE
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
 THEN COALESCE(SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RU_SAF_TYPE_CD
,CAST(CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
 /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN EOXSH.COMPENSATION_DATE ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END )
      ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_COMPENSATION_DTM 
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','ICMS-XAAS','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
 AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN ( CASE WHEN EOXSH.CREATION_DATE > '2014-11-16 00:00:00' THEN EOXSH.COMPENSATION_DATE ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END )
      ELSE DATE '3500-01-01' END AS RU_DV_COMPENSATION_DT
,SORCT.ACTION_CODE
,'I' DML_TYPE
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(CAL.CALENDAR_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) ELSE CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS RUSSIA_TRX_DATE
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE2,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_TRANS_NUM
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(CAL1.CALENDAR_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) ELSE CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS RUSSIA_AOA_ISSUANCE_DATE
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' AND SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT NOT IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS')
THEN COALESCE(SUBSTR(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15,1,POSITION('_' IN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15) -1),'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_AOA_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE7,'=') ELSE '=' END AS RUSSIA_UPFRONT_BILLING_FLG
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE10,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RUSSIA_CORRECTION_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN COALESCE(CAST(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE4 AS INTEGER),-9999) ELSE -9999 END AS RUSSIA_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE = 'CISCO RUSSIA SOL OPERATING UNIT' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RUSSIA_ROLE
,CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT LIKE '%ICMS%' THEN CAST(EOXSH.C_ATTRIBUTE8 AS VARCHAR(250))
      ELSE CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(250)) END AS ICMS_DEAL_ID_INFO_TXT	  
,CASE WHEN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE2='HYBRID-INVOICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HYBRID_INVOICE_FLG	
,COALESCE(TRIM(SUBSTR(LKP.ATTRIBUTE6,1, POSITION('~~' IN LKP.ATTRIBUTE6)-1)),'UNKNOWN') AS DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL1_REASON_CD 
,COALESCE(SUBSTRING(LKP.ATTRIBUTE6,POSITION('~~' IN LKP.ATTRIBUTE6)+2),'UNKNOWN') AS DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL2_REASON_CD 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_PREV_CUST_TRX_ID WATPCTI
                ON (WATPCTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND WATPCTI.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
                ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
                AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
                ON (SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = WATPCTI.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
                AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
                ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
/*  JOIN BY USING EL_AR_TRX_TYPE :  rchettri : LSS-Q2fy13                           
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
                ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
        AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT
                ON  SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
                AND SORCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
                AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
/* ADDED AS PART OF FLEXI INVOICE SCOPE */			
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES LKP
ON LKP.LOOKUP_CODE = SORCT.REASON_CODE
AND LKP.LOOKUP_TYPE='CREDIT_MEMO_REASON'
AND LKP.LANG = 'US'
AND LKP.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
AND LKP.ATTRIBUTE6 LIKE '%~~%'
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
                ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE
                              INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
                ON (NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
                ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
                ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS
                ON (  SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID =SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
                AND SORCT.ORG_ID      =SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
                AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   =SABS.SS_CD  )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
                ON SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
                ON((CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL  AND  SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME IN('CG','CDC')  THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END )=EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME=EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX WIORCT
                ON ( SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = WIORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
                AND SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCT.GLOBAL_NAME )
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
WHERE COALESCE(TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%') LINE_EXTN
ON SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 				
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER SO
                ON (SO.BK_COMPANY_CODE =  EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                AND SO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  = EOUGC. SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   = 
				CASE WHEN LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID IS NOT NULL 
				OR SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
				THEN CAST((CASE WHEN SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 IS NULL OR SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 = '0' THEN '-9999'
ELSE SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE3 END) AS DECIMAL(15,0)  )
				ELSE CAST(WIORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 AS DECIMAL(15,0)  ) END ) /* rchettri : LSSQ3Fy14 AUS migration: replace attribute8 with INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HEADER EOXSH
                ON SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 = CAST(EOXSH.SAF_ID AS VARCHAR(30))
                and NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXSH.GLOBAL_NAME  /* LSS-UKH post fix */    
LEFT OUTER JOIN SYS_CALENDAR.CALENDAR CAL
ON CAST(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE3 AS VARCHAR(50)) = CAST (CAST(CAL.CALENDAR_DATE  AS DATE FORMAT 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS CHAR(50))

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NATS
ON NATS.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT_ADJ.AR_TRX_KEY /* to derive SO key based on PREV customer trx ID reference*/    
LEFT OUTER JOIN SYS_CALENDAR.CALENDAR CAL1
ON CAST(SUBSTR(SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15,POSITION('_' IN SORCT.ATTRIBUTE15) +1) AS VARCHAR(50)) = CAST (CAST(CAL1.CALENDAR_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'MMDDYYYY') AS CHAR(50))
WHERE UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ' )

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID) + SMATKEY.MAX_VAL AR_TRX_KEY,
SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE
FROM
(	SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMARTRX.AR_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMARTRX ) SMATKEY,
$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

/*  JOIN BY USING EL_AR_TRX_TYPE :  rchettri : LSS-Q2fy13	
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
	ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
        AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
*/		
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT
	ON  SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
	ON (NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SORCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMATRX
			WHERE SMATRX.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			AND SMATRX.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID)

SELECT
GLOBAL_NAME,
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
CASE 
WHEN ((CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%04%' 
OR (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%02%' 
AND (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2E%'
and CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2D%'))
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%05%' 
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%06%'
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%07%' 
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3A%' 
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3B%'
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3C%'
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3D%'
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3E%'
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%03%'
OR CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1))=0
OR INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 is NULL
OR INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 = '0' )) 
THEN '-9999' 
ELSE INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 
END AS INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1 ,
CASE 
WHEN ((CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%04%' 
OR (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%02%' 
AND (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2E%'
and CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2D%'))
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%05%' 
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%06%'
OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%07%'

OR CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8))=0
OR INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 is NULL
OR INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 = 0 )) 
THEN '-9999' 
ELSE INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8
END AS INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8,

CASE 
WHEN ((CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%04%'

SELECT 
SMRCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN SMRCT.CREATION_DATE<'2005-08-15 00:00:00'   THEN COALESCE(SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID ,-9999)
    ELSE   CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN -9999
    ELSE CAST (     CASE WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA' 
      /* LSS-CF Q2FY15: INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11 will have orig_cust_trx_line information. 
      THEN SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
      */ 
      THEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11
      						WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('T4C SALES ADJ' , 'T4C - SERVICE CM' ) THEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11
						WHEN (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('DISPUTE') OR SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('DISPUTE'))
						/* Rchettri : Applied Trx for Dispute will come from PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID. On Account trx for Dispute will come from ATTTRIBUTE11 */
							/*THEN COALESCE(SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, SMRCT.ATTRIBUTE11)*/ /* amkumar2: Commented for new ERP*/										
							THEN COALESCE(SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11)
						WHEN ( SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY','ORDER ENTRY TNC')
									OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE ANY('ORDER MANAGEMENT%','OM-FBINV%')
							)
							THEN 
							/* FEB Q3fy15  LSS-OM  UKH/AUS change : ON-ACCOUNT CREDIT MEMO CHANGE : Attribute9 will have referece to org. invoice line */
								/*CASE	WHEN (SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID =0 OR SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID IS NULL)  THEN -9999 
										ELSE SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID */
								CASE	WHEN SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = 0 THEN -9999
								        WHEN SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID IS NULL THEN 
										CASE WHEN UPPER(SMRCT.ATTRIBUTE9) (CASESPECIFIC) <> LOWER(SMRCT.ATTRIBUTE9) (CASESPECIFIC) THEN -9999 ELSE SMRCT.ATTRIBUTE9 END
								    ELSE SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  
								END
						WHEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT = 'METRIX'
							THEN 
								CASE	WHEN (SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9 =0 OR SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9 IS NULL)  THEN -9999 
										ELSE SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9 
								END													
						/* RCHETTRI : LSS : REVENUE TRANSFER WILL COMES WITH CONTEXT 'SALES ADJUSTMENT'. SPECIAL_CREDIT and SPECIAL_DEBIT MUST NOT HAVE ANY REFERENCE TO INVOICE 
						WHEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS') 
							THEN COALESCE(SMRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11)
						*/	
						WHEN (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'ICMS-ADJ'  OR SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('ICMS-ADJ', 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') )/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
						
							THEN 
								CASE	WHEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10  IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN -9999
										ELSE	CASE WHEN (SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11 = 0 OR SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11 IS NULL)  THEN -9999
												ELSE SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11 
												END 
								END	
						WHEN SMRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
						 
						THEN -9999 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15 PRMADDAL : ADDED 'PP-XAAS' AS PART OF Q2FY17 */
						ELSE -9999 
									END AS DECIMAL(15,0)) 
				END 
END,-9999)   PREV_CUSOMER_TRX_ID
,SMRCT.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SMRCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMRCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON( SMRCT.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
/* ADDED FOR SERVICE RETURN*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
                ON NABS.SS_CD     = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE                    
                AND NABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT  = SMRCT.ORG_ID            
                AND NABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = SMRCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID                      
/*  JOIN BY USING EL_AR_TRX_TYPE :  rchettri : LSS-Q2fy13  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
    ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT= SMRCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
                   AND  NATT.SS_CODE= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                   AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE      =EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
                   AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY        
                    )
*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_TRX_TYPE EATT
                ON  SMRCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = EATT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
                AND SMRCT.ORG_ID = EATT.ORG_ID
                AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EATT.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
                ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = EATT.TRX_TYPE_CODE
